4047.issue: [S4047] Adapter "chargemaster" is not yet available in the stable repository. Please consider adding it.

5042.issue: [W5042] Package "axios" is used in source file(s) (src/lib/tools.ts) but not found in dependencies of [package.json](https://github.com/hombach/ioBroker.chargemaster/blob/master/package.json). Dependency might be missing.

5054.issue: [S5054] method "setObject()" should be avoided. Please use "setObjectNotExists()" or "extendObject()" instead.

Please add the standard Sentry notice near the top of [README.md](https://github.com/hombach/ioBroker.chargemaster/blob/master/README.md).

0066.issue: [W0066] "@types/node":"^25.8.0" at [package.json](https://github.com/hombach/ioBroker.chargemaster/blob/master/package.json) allows major version greater than 22. Downgrade to node.js 22.x.x to avoid wrong typing is recommended.
